name: Environmental Science

sections.label: Concurrent Primary Major (choose one track)
sections.description: Concurrent major in biology OR chemistry is required. Track A (with Biology): major in biology + MTH-135 Calculus I + BIO-535/530 Environmental Microbiology and Lab. Track B (with Chemistry): major in chemistry + MTH-145 Calculus II + PHY-185/-185L General Physics I + PHY-195/-195L General Physics II + CHM-412/-412L Environmental Analysis and Lab OR BIO-535/530 Environmental Microbiology and Lab.

sections.label: Field Courses (choose two, with associated labs)

items.title: Behavior and Ecology of Vertebrates and Lab
Any course taught at the Wilderness Field Station (BIO prefix)

notes: Recommended courses: BIO-105 Introduction to Environmental Studies; MTH-145 Calculus II; RHE-357 Environmental Rhetoric; STA-100/110 or STA-100/130. Students with a biology primary should follow biology department guidance for the first year; students with chemistry primary should follow chemistry guidance.
